recommendations.title: Hotel Gagarin
recommendations.overview: An highly heterogeneous group of people go to Armenia to make a movie, all ignoring what will happen to each of them.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: The Boxtrolls
recommendations.overview: An orphaned boy raised by underground creatures called Boxtrolls comes up from the sewers and out of his box to save his family and the town from the evil exterminator, Archibald Snatcher.

recommendations.title: Bird People
recommendations.overview: An overstressed American businessman and a French chambermaid make a connection at an airport hotel in Paris.

recommendations.title: A Mermaid in Paris
recommendations.overview: A man rescues a mermaid in Paris and slowly falls in love with her.
